description_long: This is a two-seater sofa with a soft, matte blue upholstery and four loose, square cushions in a slightly lighter blue shade. The sofa features wide, gently flared armrests that are padded and rise to the same height as the backrest, creating a continuous, enveloping silhouette. The backrest is moderately high and curves smoothly into the armrests, providing a cozy and supportive seating area. The seat consists of two large, plush cushions, while the back and seat cushions are visibly loose and varied in their arrangement, giving a casual, lived-in appearance. The sofa stands on four short, turned legs that are painted to match the upholstery color. The overall design is simple and modern, with a focus on comfort and soft, rounded forms.
description: A soft blue two-seater sofa with wide, padded armrests, four loose square cushions, and short matching legs. The design is modern, cozy, and features a continuous curved backrest.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, two seat cushions, four loose back cushions, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the arrangement of the cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, smooth backrest and the sofa's overall width.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the sofa's profile, the height of the backrest and armrest, and the cushion placement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Four loose, square cushions in varied positions on the seat and back; two large seat cushions; all cushions are uniform in size and unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, padded armrests that are present on both sides, rising to the same height as the backrest with a gently flared, rounded profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, turned legs positioned at the corners, painted in a matching blue color, with a simple, rounded design and no visible metallic or wooden texture.
attribute_backrest_type: Moderately high, continuous backrest that curves smoothly into the armrests, with no visible tufting or segmentation; back cushions are loose and rest against it.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue upholstery with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, stitching, or decorative detailing.
